response.original_title: Μακεδονία: Ταξίδι Στην Ιστορία, Τον Χρόνο Και Τον Θρύλο
response.overview: Μακεδονία: Ταξίδι στην Ιστορία, τον Χρόνο και τον Θρύλο (1969) is a documentary exploring the land of Greek Macedonia through its history, archaeology, mythology, and cultural heritage. Travelling from the legendary kingdom of Philip II and Alexander the Great to the Byzantine era and modern Greece, the film combines historic sites, monuments, landscapes, and traditional life to present Macedonia as a region where history and legend have intertwined for millennia. Featuring period cinematography and historical narration, the documentary offers a sweeping portrait of one of Greece's most significant regions and its enduring contribution to Hellenic civilisation.
response.tagline: A Timeless Chronicle of Greece's Northern Heartland
response.title: Macedonia: A Journey Through History, Time and Legend
